title: Carne Asada Tacos (Community Enhanced)
instructions: Marinate steak in citrus mixture for 24 hours.
Let rest, then slice against the grain.

source_review.text: Best tacos ever! Marinated for 24 hours instead of 4. Added a dash of cumin and squeeze of lime right before serving.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Marinating the steak for a longer period can enhance the flavor and tenderness.

changes_made.from_text: Marinate steak in citrus mixture for 4 hours.
changes_made.to_text: Marinate steak in citrus mixture for 24 hours.

source_review.text: Great flavor! I topped with cotija cheese and a drizzle of sour cream. Next time will add more jalapenos.

modifications_applied.reasoning: To enhance the flavor and texture of the tacos

enhancement_summary.expected_impact: Marinating the steak for a longer period can enhance the flavor and tenderness.; To enhance the flavor and texture of the tacos
